title: Bridge Essay: The respiratory modulation of interoception.
concept: Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.
**Phase context:** Interoception as spiritus — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, felt aliveness.

**The respiratory modulation of interoception.** — J Neurophysiol (2022). DOI: 10.1152/jn.00027.2022. PMID: 35294271. In a recent article published in The Journal of Neurophysiology titled "Sensitivity to changes in rate of heartbeats as a measure of interoceptive ability," Larsson et al. (J Neurophysiol 126: 1799-1813, 2021) introduce a new method to evaluate the interoceptive ability and report a surprising tendency in humans to perceive fewer heartbeats during spontaneous increases in resting heart rate.
